title: pelargonium × muthianum
intro: Pelargonium × muthianum, commonly known as Mountain Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species in the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its fragrant, pink or white flowers and dark green leaves. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its essential oil. The health benefits of Pelargonium × muthianum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, improve digestion, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation, ease menstrual cramps, and support overall well-being.
